title: Faux Flowers White Peony Artificial Flowers Silk Single Stem Peony Fake Flowers Bouquet for Wedding Home Party Table Centerpieces Floral Arrangement Hotel Office Decor Cream White 4105
features: Package included - 2 pcs faux flowers (the vase is not included).
Material - decorative artificial plants flower head made of silk cloth. Metal wire as skeleton, wrapped by plastic, can be cut or bent.

Perfect Decoration - E.g:(engagement/ wedding ceremony/ Valentine’s Day/ Anniversary/ Lover's Birthday/ Festivals etc.) or home decor:( vases/ stairs/ doors/ frames/ mirrors/ ugly pipes/ garden/ table/ swing/ arches/ cars/ bikes.) etc.
Never Wither - faux flowers are maintenance-free, perfect for pollen allergic people. Fake flowers is uv resistant and never fade. This flowers can against fierce wind rainstorm and insolation.
Easy to maintain - The tall artificial plants may be squeezed and deformed during transportation. Please adjust the branches and flowers to the most natural state.
